description.value: You lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency rank in unarmored defense. You gain resistance 8 to physical damage and are immune to precision damage. You can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. You gain a fly Speed equal to your normal fly Speed and can slip through tiny cracks. This form lasts for 5 minutes or until you Dismiss it.
